description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two elongated, metallic blades joined at a central pivot point, allowing them to open and close in a shearing motion. The handles are made of a blue plastic material, ergonomically shaped with two oval finger loops for comfortable grip. The blades are straight, tapering to a pointed tip, and are finished in a matte dark gray, suggesting stainless steel construction. The pivot joint is visible and appears to be a simple rivet, providing a smooth axis for the blades to rotate. The handles are symmetrical, suitable for both left- and right-handed users, and lack any visible padding or textured grip. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of blue-handled scissors with pointed metallic blades and symmetrical oval finger loops, joined by a central rivet. The design is ergonomic and suitable for ambidextrous use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both blue handles and the full length of the pointed blades, with the pivot joint visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the scissors, with the blades and handles aligned and minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the handles and blades from the opposite side, with the pivot joint visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge profile of the scissors with little detail.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, oval-shaped, ambidextrous handles made of smooth blue plastic with no padding or special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized oval loops, smooth and untextured, designed to accommodate multiple fingers comfortably.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips for precision cutting.
